notes: Each model should add one or more independent candidates without seeing other models' results.
Replacement decisions require real Deriv M15 spread-gated CSVs from fetch_spreadgated.py.

candidates.name: pullback-expiry-4
candidates.rationale: Give the validated pullback limit one extra M15 bar to fill while preserving TP=3 and pure-bracket exits.

candidates.name: stronger-impulse
candidates.rationale: Require a slightly cleaner impulse to reduce marginal low-quality fills without changing entry geometry.

candidates.name: hold-12-bracket
candidates.rationale: Keep the current pure bracket but allow more time for slow winners to reach the 3 ATR target.

candidates.name: us-open-session-gate
candidates.rationale: Example of a simulator-supported but EA-unsupported filter. It can rank as research, but cannot replace the EA until implemented in MQL5.
